summary: EXP-276 closes the H2-H6 minor batch via four distinct edits: (a) P2 explicit h_Moon proportional-scaling justification + alternative-reading parenthetical; (b) P3 swapA MST + NN sequence (replaces unrigorous 12,000 km greedy-NN floor with 7,000 km MST true lower bound, plus 12,400–18,800 km NN heuristic range); (c) P3 swapB European-swath null pre-empt (10^-16 to 10^-21 stricter, ≈10^-9 with real-observatory set); (d) new "Notes on inputs" footnote covering the three c1 carryover minors (R_p∝h_Moon parallel-ray approximation, SNK/GUI station code reconciliation, NASA umbra path source attribution).
note: See EXP-276 expansion file for full replacement_html (full_section_replacement of #p4-427-station-coverage).
